<p class="key-answer" data-question="Fentanyl 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Fentanyl</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Fentanyl 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：PecFent is indicated for the management of breakthrough pain in adults who are already receiving maintenance opioid therapy for chronic cancer pain. Breakthrough pain is a transitory exacerbation of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.5%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（98.9%）</li>
<li>myofascial pain syndrome（98.1%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.1%）</li>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（97.7%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（97.7%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（97.3%）</li>
<li>methemoglobinemia（97.2%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（97.0%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（97.0%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（97.0%）</li>
<li>fibromyalgia（96.8%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（96.5%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（96.4%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（96.3%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（96.2%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myositis（96.2%）</li>
<li>restless legs syndrome（96.2%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（96.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
